name: Logistics and Transport (Zimbabwe)
definition: Businesses moving goods and people and managing supply chains: road haulage, courier and last-mile delivery, passenger transport, freight forwarding, customs clearing and warehousing services.

subSectors.name: Road haulage
subSectors.description: General and specialised freight, including cross-border.

subSectors.name: Passenger transport
subSectors.description: Buses, commuter and staff transport operators.

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Managed fleets with depots and contracts.
National and regional fleet operators and 3PLs.

officialSizeThresholds.note: No official operator-size classification was verified from an official source in this revision.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design. Vehicle licensing, operator permits and customs-agent regimes are declared as research gaps rather than described.
